description: The ChildParentAudioClipPlayer component plays specified audio clips when it's immediate children are added to or removed from.

fields.ParentUnder: Where to parent the slots to when playing sounds. (DON'T SET THIS TO THE SLOT THIS COMPONENT IS ON. else it will spam audio every game tick)
fields.MinDistance: The override for all ClipDatas Min Distance when they are played.
fields.MaxDistance: The override for all ClipDatas Max Distance when they are played.
fields.RolloffMode: The override for all ClipDatas Rolloff Mode when they are played.
fields.PlayPointMode: Where to position audio clips when they are played.
fields.ChildLimit: If the immediate children count of this component's slot is above this amount, it will not play sounds.
fields.FilterTag: If an added or removed immediate child has a tag that matches this value, a sound will not be played.
fields.ParentedClips: A list of audio clips to play when a slot is added to the immediate children of this component's slot.
fields.UnparentedClips: A list of audio clips to play when a slot is removed from the immediate children of this component's slot.
